ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the server is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the server was deployed */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the server */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Hardware model of the server */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the server software */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the server */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Brief history of maintenance activities */,
  "server_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hard_drives" (
  "hard_drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hard drive */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server where the hard drive is installed */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the hard drive is located */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the hard drive */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the hard drive */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the hard drive */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the hard drive was installed */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the hard drive */,
  "drive_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the hard drive */,
  "drive_interface" TEXT /* Interface type of the hard drive */,
  "drive_speed" INTEGER /* Rotational speed of the hard drive */,
  "drive_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the hard drive */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the hard drive */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Brief history of maintenance activities */,
  "drive_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the hard drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hard_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hard_drives_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hard_drives_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the data center */,
  "total_servers" INTEGER /* Total number of servers in the data center */,
  "total_hard_drives" INTEGER /* Total number of hard drives in the data center */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server related to the alert */,
  "hard_drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hard drive related to the alert */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_hard_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("hard_drive_id") REFERENCES hard_drives ("hard_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server related to the maintenance */,
  "hard_drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hard drive related to the maintenance */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center related to the maintenance */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_hard_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("hard_drive_id") REFERENCES hard_drives ("hard_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_maintenance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance plan */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server related to the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_maintenance_plans_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hard_drive_maintenance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance plan */,
  "hard_drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hard drive related to the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hard_drive_maintenance_plans_hard_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("hard_drive_id") REFERENCES hard_drives ("hard_drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_center_maintenance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance plan */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center related to the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_center_maintenance_plans_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server event */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_events_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hard_drive_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hard drive event */,
  "hard_drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hard drive related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hard_drive_events_hard_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("hard_drive_id") REFERENCES hard_drives ("hard_drive_id")
)
